name: OFI Z-Score in High Volatility Regime
hypothesis: Previous OFI signals (e.g., iter002_ofi_proxy_zscore_gt_25) showed inconsistent performance. This spec hypothesizes that OFI is a more reliable predictor during periods of high market activity. By gating the z-scored OFI signal with a high volatility regime filter, we aim to capture strong directional flow while filtering out noise from quiet periods.
mutation_note: Added a volatility regime filter (`rolling_realized_vol > 50`) to the z-scored OFI signal to improve consistency, a different approach after parent was tagged 'drop_feature'. Threshold kept at 2.0 to focus on extreme events.
